questions.question: 1 (a) Pour 100 cm 3 of hot water into beaker A. Place the thermometer in the water in beaker A by moving the clamp stand. In Table 1.1, record the temperature θ of the water at time t = 0 and immediately start the stopclock. Record, in Table 1.1, the temperature θ of the water at times t = 30 s, 60 s, 90 s, 120 s, 150 s

parts.text: 1 (a) Pour 100 cm 3 of hot water into beaker A. Place the thermometer in the water in beaker A by moving the clamp stand.
